data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Rekt (REKT), Airdrop Open to Users With 170+ Points
data.description:
Binance Alpha has officially launched Rekt (REKT), and eligible users can now claim part of the 140,230,000 REKT token airdrop through the Alpha event page. The airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis for users holding at least 170 Binance Alpha points. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points, and users must confirm their participation on the event page within 24 hours of the token's trading launch. Any unclaimed tokens after the deadline will be forfeited
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/26232679439586?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $172 Million in Liquidations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $172 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, short positions accounted for $132 million, while long positions saw liquidations of $40.167 million.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Predicts $10,000 ATH For Ethereum This Cycle, Here’s Why
data.description:
Crypto analyst XForce has predicted that Ethereum could reach a new all-time high (ATH) of $10,000 in this market cycle. He acknowledged that there is yet to be a macro fundamental that supports this bullish outlook, but remarked that it remains “ideal. ” Ethereum Eyeing Rally To As High As $10,000 In an X post, XForce stated that Ethereum is still looking to shoot for a new ATH this cycle and could end around $9,000 to $10,000. This followed his remarks that ETH’s move up on the shorter timeframes was objectively impulsive
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/10000-ath-for-ethereum/

data.title: $50,820,000,000,000 of Highly Anticipated ‘Great Wealth Transfer’ Will Evaporate in Just Two Generations: Report
data.description:
The vast majority of the much-hyped great wealth transfer from baby boomers to their heirs will vanish in relatively short order, according to a new report. An eye-popping 70% of the $72. 6 trillion that’s expected to be inherited will be lost across just two generations, reports Worth Magazine, citing research from the Williams Group
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/28/50820000000000-of-highly-anticipated-great-wealth-transfer-will-evaporate-in-just-two-generations-report/

data.description:

Assembly lines froze, factories shut down, and by the end of the week, the panic was global. Companies in Europe went dark. Ford was forced to idle its Explorer SUV […]

data.title: REX Shares: Solana Collateralized ETF Coming Soon
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News REX Shares announced on the X platform that the Solana staking ETF "REX-Osprey SOL+Staking ETF" is coming soon. It is reported that the ETF aims to track Solana's performance while generating income through on-chain staking. It is also said that the ETF is the first staking cryptocurrency ETF in the United States. In addition, Eric Balchunas, senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, disclosed on the X platform that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission said there was no further comment, so it looks like they are ready to launch.
Earlier news, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) issued a warning to REX Shares and Osprey Funds, saying that the staking Ethereum and Solana ETFs they are planning to launch may not meet the definition of "investment company" in the Investment Company Act and fail to meet the legal compliance requirements of ETFs.

data.title: Solana Staking ETF Set to Launch in the U.S.
data.description:
According to Odaily, REX Shares announced on the X platform that the Solana staking ETF, named "REX-Osprey SOL+Staking ETF," is set to launch soon. This ETF aims to track Solana's performance while generating returns through on-chain staking. It is reportedly the first staking cryptocurrency ETF in the United States.

Bloomberg's senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas revealed on the X platform that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has no further comments, indicating readiness for the launch. Previously, the SEC had warned REX Shares and Osprey Funds that their proposed staking Ethereum and Solana ETFs might not meet the legal compliance requirements under the Investment Company Act, as they may not fit the definition of an "investment company."
